summary: Research complete. Option A (Python drives search, Lean verifies) is the only viable architecture. The search/best_first.py stub is the primary implementation target. Value network provides additive bonus to the rule-based heuristic score with weight alpha. Tasks 11 (value network) and 12 (benchmark suite) must complete before task 13 can be implemented. No Lean source modifications needed.

artifacts.summary: Architecture analysis: Python A* loop in search/best_first.py mirrors Lean bestFirst_search but scores nodes with neural additive bonus from value network. Covers search node design, heuristic combination formula, latency constraints, evaluation protocol (McNemar test, 200-formula benchmark), and full dependency chain.
